Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class SmtLib2Translator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.AbstractSMTTranslator
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SmtLib2Translator
All Implemented Interfaces:
SMTTranslator
public class SmtLib2Translator extends AbstractSMTTranslator
The translation for the SMT2-format. It nearly the same as for the SMT1-format.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.AbstractSMTTranslator

  • Constructor Details

    • SmtLib2Translator

      public SmtLib2Translator(String[] handlerNames, String[] handlerOptions, @Nullable String preamble)
      This constructor only exists to have uniform constructors for both the modular and the legacy translation.
      Parameters:
      handlerNames - not used by this translator!
      handlerOptions - also not used by this translator
      preamble - also also not used

    • getBoolSort

      protected StringBuilder getBoolSort()

      The String used for boolean values.

    • buildCompleteText

      protected StringBuilder buildCompleteText(StringBuilder formula, ArrayList<StringBuilder> assumptions, ArrayList<de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.ContextualBlock> assumptionBlocks, ArrayList<ArrayList<StringBuilder>> functions, ArrayList<ArrayList<StringBuilder>> predicates, ArrayList<de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.ContextualBlock> predicateBlocks, ArrayList<StringBuilder> types, SortHierarchy sortHierarchy, SMTSettings settings)
      Description copied from class: AbstractSMTTranslator
      Build the text, that can be read by the final decider. If the assumptions should be added to the formula, add them like assumtions impliy formula.
      Specified by:
      buildCompleteText in class AbstractSMTTranslator
      Parameters:
      formula - The formula, that was built out of the internal representation. It is built by ante implies succ.
      assumptions - Assumptions made in this logic. Set of formulas, that are assumed to be true.
      assumptionBlocks - List of ContextualBlocks, which refer to the position of different types of assumptions in the container assumptions. Use these objects to make detailed comments in the translations. For more information see the class ContextualBlock .
      functions - List of functions. Each Listelement is built up like (name | sort1 | ... | sortn | resultsort)
      predicates - List of predicates. Each Listelement is built up like (name | sort1 | ... | sortn)
      predicateBlocks - List of ContextualBlocks, which refer to the position of different types of predicate in the container predicates. Use these objects to make detailed comments in the translations. For more information see the class ContextualBlock .
      types - List of the used types.
      Returns:
      The StringBuilder that can be read by the decider

    • translateSort

      protected StringBuilder translateSort(String name, boolean isIntVal)
      Translate a sort.
      Specified by:
      translateSort in class AbstractSMTTranslator
      Parameters:
      name - the sorts name
      isIntVal - true, if the sort should represent some kind of integer
      Returns:
      Argument 1 of the return value is the sort used in var declarations, Argument2 is the sort used for type predicates

    • isMultiSorted

      protected boolean isMultiSorted()
      Description copied from class: AbstractSMTTranslator
      Returns, whether the Structure, this translator creates should be a Structure, that is multi sorted. If false, a single sorted structure is created. Then all sorts are translated as integers.
      Specified by:
      isMultiSorted in class AbstractSMTTranslator
      Returns:
      true, if multi sorted logic is supported.

    • getIntegerSort

      protected StringBuilder getIntegerSort()
      Description copied from class: AbstractSMTTranslator
      The String used for integer values. This sort is also used in single sorted logics.
      Specified by:
      getIntegerSort in class AbstractSMTTranslator
      Returns:
      The String used for integers.

      Translate the integer division. Override this, if integer division is supported.

      Parameters:

      Build the StringBuilder for an object equivalence.

    • translateLogicalIfThenElse

      protected StringBuilder translateLogicalIfThenElse(StringBuilder cond, StringBuilder ifterm, StringBuilder elseterm)
      Description copied from class: AbstractSMTTranslator
      Translate the logical if_then_else construct. All attributes are logical formulas. If the underlying language does not support this contruct, it is equivalent with (cond IMPLIES ifterm) AND (NOT(cond) IMPLIES thenterm) and can be reduced to this.
      Specified by:
      translateLogicalIfThenElse in class AbstractSMTTranslator
      Parameters:
      cond - the condition term.
      ifterm - the formula used, if cond=true
      elseterm - the term used, if cond=false
      Returns:
      ther StringBuilder representing the if then else construct

    • translateTermIfThenElse

      protected StringBuilder translateTermIfThenElse(StringBuilder cond, StringBuilder ifterm, StringBuilder elseterm)
      Description copied from class: AbstractSMTTranslator
      Translate the if_then_else construct for terms (i.e. ifterm and condterm are not of Sort FORMULA) If this method is nor overriden, a default implementation is used. This might me less effective than a language supported translation. So, if allowed by the target language, override this.
      Overrides:
      translateTermIfThenElse in class AbstractSMTTranslator
      Parameters:
      cond - the condition formula
      ifterm - the term used if cond = true.
      elseterm - the term used if cond = false.
      Returns:
      the StringBuilder representing the if then else construct.

    • translatePredicate

      protected StringBuilder translatePredicate(StringBuilder name, ArrayList<StringBuilder> args)
      Description copied from class: AbstractSMTTranslator
      Translate a predicate.
      Specified by:
      translatePredicate in class AbstractSMTTranslator
      Parameters:
      name - The Symbol of the predicate.
      args - The arguments of the predicate.
      Returns:
      the formula representing the predicate.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
